svg.title: Lambda Architecture — Streaming speed layer vs Airflow batch layer
svg.desc: Lambda architecture diagram showing the streaming speed layer using Spark Structured Streaming and the batch layer using Airflow DAGs converging on a serving layer.
svg.text: LAMBDA ARCHITECTURE · Speed Layer + Batch Layer → Serving Layer
SERVING LAYER · unified view across both paths
Both paths converge on Trino — serving layer queries either in unified SQL
